name: Baker's Holiday Trifle
recipeIngredient: 1 package (6-serve size) Jello Vanilla Pudding Mix
6 Squares Baker's White Chocolate, coarsely chopped
1/4 cup Orange liqueur or Orange Juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pudding according to package directions using milk.
2. Remove from heat; stir in chopped chocolate until melted and smooth.
3. Cover with plastic wrap and chill.
4. Fold in 1 cup (250 mL) whipped topping.
5. Cut cake into small cubes and drizzle with liqueur.
6. In the bottom of a deep glass bowl, layer half the cake cubes, half the berries, half the pudding, and half the grated chocolate.
7. Repeat layers, ending with chocolate.
8. Top with remaining whipped topping.
9. Garnish with strawberries.
10. Drizzle melted chocolate over top.
Prep Time: 30 minutes plus chilling time
